title: Implement final header layout
description: Main nav must contain کشف تجربه‌ها, گفت‌وگوها, پروفایل. Utilities must contain راهنما, اعلان‌ها, کیف پول.
acceptance_criteria: Header groups main navigation and utilities; settings is not a top-level nav item.

title: Build discover page
description: Search and filter experience profiles by role, category, org level, company and years group.
acceptance_criteria: Profiles render with avatar fallback, role, org level, categories, companies, CSAT and successful conversations.

title: Implement save/follow actions
description: Allow authenticated users to save and follow profiles from discovery/profile pages.
acceptance_criteria: Button state changes immediately; saved/followed items appear in network page.

title: Public experience profile page
description: Show avatar, display name, role, org level, years, categories, companies, language, summary, rating and successful conversations.
acceptance_criteria: Profile route loads public data and supports request CTA for authenticated users.

title: Avatar uploader
description: Add profile image upload with preview, replace, remove, type and size validation.
acceptance_criteria: Accept PNG/JPG/WebP; reject invalid type/size; store avatarUrl.

title: Experience profile form
description: Implement displayName, role, orgLevel, years, categories, companies, languages, summary, prices and free help.
acceptance_criteria: Form validates all fields and supports draft save and preview.

title: Pricing caps validation
description: Enforce max prices by org level and allow lower prices or free help.
acceptance_criteria: Server and client reject values above cap; freeHelp sets both prices to 0.

title: Profile review lifecycle
description: Implement draft, pending_review, needs_changes, active and inactive states.
acceptance_criteria: Submitted profile becomes pending_review; active profile is discoverable.

title: Create conversation request
description: Authenticated seeker creates request for a profile and duration.
acceptance_criteria: Request status becomes requested; provider sees it under received/needs action.

title: Conversation inbox
description: Implement tabs درخواست‌های من and درخواست‌های دریافتی grouped by نیازمند اقدام, در حال پیگیری, تمام‌شده.
acceptance_criteria: Actions render based on state and actor.

title: Provider time proposal
description: Provider selects 3 to 6 Shamsi date/time options via chips.
acceptance_criteria: No free text; duplicates blocked; submit disabled outside 3..6 range.

title: Seeker time selection
description: Seeker selects one provider-proposed time or cancels.
acceptance_criteria: Selected time moves conversation to awaiting payment.

title: Checkout finalization
description: Calculate price, wallet deduction and gateway payable amount.
acceptance_criteria: After successful payment, conversation becomes scheduled.

title: Wallet page
description: Show balance, available payout, pending payout and transactions with filter.
acceptance_criteria: Top-up and payout panels exist.

title: Collect payout info
description: Collect account owner name and Iranian IBAN/Shaba before payout.
acceptance_criteria: Payout blocked until valid IR + 24 digits is stored.

title: Notification center
description: Badge, unread/read list and deep links.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking notification marks read and routes to related page.

title: Network manager
description: Tabs for following, saved, followers with search/filter/sort.
acceptance_criteria: Large saved lists handled through server-side pagination.

title: Feedback flow
description: Allow feedback after successful conversation and show received feedback to provider.
acceptance_criteria: Feedback visible in received feedback page and profile summary.

title: Account settings inside profile
description: Edit account info, notification toggles, privacy toggles and settlement access.
acceptance_criteria: Settings page is reachable from profile/account area.

title: Profile review admin flow
description: Admin reviews profile submissions and sets active/needs_changes/rejected-like needs_changes state.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can provide required changes; profile owner sees needs_changes.

title: Event tracking taxonomy
description: Track search, filter, save, follow, request, time proposal, time selection, payment, feedback.
acceptance_criteria: Events use stable names and entity ids.

title: E2E and state tests
description: Implement E2E tests from package scenarios and state machine transition tests.
acceptance_criteria: CI fails on invalid transitions and broken critical flows.
